---
name: 📖 Documentation Request
about: Report missing or unclear documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation', 'needs-review']
---

## 📄 Description

What documentation is missing or unclear?

## 🔗 Location

Where did you look for this documentation?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] ROADMAP.md
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Skills in `.github/skills/`
- [ ] GitHub Wiki
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Other: **\_\_\_**

## 🤷 What was unclear?

What specific part was confusing or missing?

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

How would you like this to be documented?

## 📝 Example

If possible, provide an example of what clearer documentation would look like.

## 🎯 Audience

Who do you think needs this documentation?

- [ ] New contributors
- [ ] API consumers
- [ ] Developers setting up locally
- [ ] DevOps/deployment
- [ ] Other: **\_\_\_**

## 📚 Additional Context

Any links or related information that might help.
